title: PersonasConfig
description: Schema for api/app/personas/config.json — persona definitions and shared defaults.

defaultPersonaSettings.description: Fallback values merged into any persona that omits a field.

personas.description: Ordered list of coaching personas. Only personas with available=true are returned by the API.

VoiceLocale.description: Supported locale codes. Add new locales here — VoiceIds picks them up automatically.

VoiceGenderBucket.description: Maps gender variants to ElevenLabs voice ID strings. At least one key should be present.

masculine.description: ElevenLabs voice ID for masculine voice.

feminine.description: ElevenLabs voice ID for feminine voice.

neutral.description: ElevenLabs voice ID for gender-neutral voice.

VoiceIds.description: Map of locale key to gender bucket. Add new locale codes to VoiceLocale to extend.

ElevenLabsConfig.description: ElevenLabs TTS generation settings for a persona.

normalization.description: 'elevenlabs' — let ElevenLabs normalize text (recommended); 'internal' — apply our own _truncate_at_sentence preprocessing instead.

similarityBoost.description: Similarity boost to the original voice. Higher values reduce vocal drift.

style.description: Style exaggeration (0=neutral/literal, 1=expressive). Use 0.0 to prevent the model from ad-libbing greetings or rephrasing.

useSpeakerBoost.description: Boost speaker similarity. Adds latency; useful for cloned voices.

fallback.description: 'browser' — fall back to window.speechSynthesis if ElevenLabs fails; 'none' — hard fail silently.

browserFallbackEnabled.description: Master switch for browser speechSynthesis fallback. If false, fallback is suppressed even when fallback='browser'.

PersonaDefaults.description: Shared default values. Each persona inherits these and may override individual fields.

soulFile.description: Default soul file path relative to the personas/ directory.

id.description: Unique slug used in API routes and config lookups.

name.description: Display name shown in the UI.

description.description: Short persona description shown in the persona selector.

icon.description: Single emoji used as the persona avatar.

soulFile.description: Path to the persona soul Markdown file, relative to personas/.

available.description: If false, the persona is hidden from the API and UI.
